name: Vertex AI Agent Builder
description: Comprehensive platform for enterprises to build, deploy, scale, and govern AI agents. Includes Agent Development Kit (ADK), Agent Engine runtime, visual Agent Designer, and multi-agent coordination via Agent2Agent protocol.
notes: Includes Agent Development Kit (open-source framework), managed Agent Engine runtime, low-code Agent Designer (preview Dec 2025), and Agent2Agent protocol for multi-agent communication. Supports Gemini models and third-party models. Enterprise governance with Cloud IAM, observability dashboards, and security features (Model Armor, CMEK support).
